failedAssertions.reason: Performance metrics (Sharpe, drawdown, profit factor) present in API response but FreqUI cannot render them. Backtesting summary section is empty. Root cause: backtest result schema incompatibility — missing/misformatted fields cause JS errors (RangeError: Invalid time value on backtest_start_ts/end_ts, TypeError on exit_reason aggregation data).

Multiple JavaScript console errors from FreqTrade schema mismatches: (1) TypeError: Cannot read undefined.split in TimeRangeSelect (timerange format), (2) TypeError: Cannot read undefined.length/map in backtestMetrics (missing exit_reason data), (3) RangeError: Invalid time value (backtest_start_ts/end_ts format), (4) TypeError: Cannot read undefined.forEach in chart rendering (missing market_change data). Core flow works but summary sections fail to render.

No visual benchmark comparison displayed in FreqUI. The /api/v1/backtest/history/{filename}/market_change endpoint returns correct data via curl (65 data points), but FreqUI's internal getBacktestMarketChange request returns 404 — URL pattern mismatch between what FreqUI expects and what the backend implements.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: agent-browser section with login flow, navigation, backtest flow, isolation rules, and evidence format for browser-based testing
